description: You are an audio engineer creating content for a wellness app. Using the mono voice recording at /home/ga/Audio/client_files/narration.wav, create an immersive 'ear-to-ear' ASMR whisper track using the Haas effect. Create two tracks named 'Left Whisper' and 'Right Whisper', import the source audio to both, and hard-pan them fully left and right respectively. Apply the Haas effect by offsetting one track relative to the other and reduce the volume of both to a whisper level. Save the Ardour session.
